mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(c.category_name, '未分类') AS categoryName, COUNT(a.id) AS cardCount, COALESCE(SUM(a.original_value), 0) AS totalOriginalValue, COALESCE(SUM(a.net_value), 0) AS totalNetValue FROM fa_asset a LEFT JOIN fa_category c ON a.category_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.category_name ORDER BY categoryName
